message:
feat(fnp-python): native Rust mean implementation + conformance harness

Ports np.mean from Python passthrough to native Rust UFuncArray::reduce_mean.
Adds 100+ conformance test cases covering flat reduction, 2D/3D axis,
keepdims, integer dtypes, and NaN handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
